center.name: Nikolai Severtsov
center.summary: Nikolai Severtsov是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括花彩雀莺、黑顶麻雀，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The white-browed tit-warbler (Leptopoecile sophiae) is a species of bird in the family Aegithalidae

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The saxaul sparrow (Passer ammodendri) is a passerine bird of the sparrow family (Passeridae), found in parts of Central Asia
